python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-09':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

QID: 14689
Title: What country will be identified as the location of a fatal mass shooting at a secondary school by February 11, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. Fatal attacks at schools can draw national attention and are commonly identified first by country in early public reporting. This question asks which country official statements and major news reports will name as the location by the resolution date.
---
QID: 312764
Title: Who will be named Egypt’s minister of planning in the cabinet reshuffle by 15 February 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. Egypt’s president can propose cabinet changes that parliament then approves. The planning ministry is a senior cabinet portfolio tied to national economic and development policy.
---
QID: 487245
Title: What country will be named as a source of tensions surrounding the U.S. president's late-February 2026 address?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-30. International disputes can shape the focus and framing of a U.S. president's nationally televised speech. Forecasters are assessing which country will be highlighted in coverage as a key source of tension around the address.
---
QID: 527803
Title: What town will authorities identify as the site of a deadly school shooting in Canada by February 11, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. Canadian authorities sometimes confirm the exact location of a major violent incident only after emergency response begins. This question asks for the town name that will be publicly identified if a deadly school shooting in Canada is confirmed before the resolution 
---
